overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia exploring a dimly lit medieval cottage interior with stone and wooden architecture, illuminated by warm firelight and window glow. The character moves through interconnected rooms including a main hall with fireplace, a dark corridor, and an upper storage room.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cottage main room with stone fireplace

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking slowly around the main room, examining the fireplace and woodpile area

entered.detail: Large stone fireplace with white plaster hood and warm fire glowing inside
Tall stack of chopped firewood piled against the wall
Rustic wooden shelves holding pottery and jars
Clay pots and ceramic vessels on the shelves
Sturdy wooden block with an axe embedded in it
Warm glowing lantern suspended from the ceiling beam

segments.scene_description: Geralt explores the main room of a rustic cottage, illuminated by firelight from a large stone fireplace. The room features a substantial woodpile, wooden shelving with pottery, and a chopping block, creating a cozy medieval atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark wooden corridor and stairwell connecting rooms

events.description: Geralt moves from the lit main room into a dark narrow corridor

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through a dark doorway and descending wooden stairs into a narrow corridor

entered.detail: Dark wooden doorway leading to the corridor
Rough stone wall texture in the dim corridor
Heavy timber door frame with metal hinges
Narrow passageway with minimal lighting
Steep wooden staircase descending to lower level

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the warm main room into a narrow, dimly lit corridor with stone and wooden walls, descending a steep staircase that creates a sense of moving deeper into the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper storage room with wooden walls and furniture

events.description: Emerging from dark corridor into a lit upper room with wooden furniture
Geralt turns to face camera for close-up inspection

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking around the upper room examining barrels and shelves, then turning to face the camera directly

entered.detail: Several wooden storage barrels stacked near the wall
Rustic wooden table with various items on surface
Mounted wooden shelves holding small objects and bottles
Small window with wooden lattice showing dark night outside
Wooden ladder leaning against the back wall
Large tapestry or map hanging on the far wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges into a well-lit upper room featuring wooden barrels, a dining table, and wall shelves. A small lattice window reveals the night outside. The character explores the space before turning to face the camera in a close-up shot.

scene_state.functional_zone: return journey through corridor to main room

events.description: Geralt sits down at wooden table then stands to leave
Re-entering the main room with stone fireplace from the corridor

agents.ego_description: Geralt briefly sits at the table, then stands and walks back through the dark corridor to return to the main room

entered.detail: Large stone fireplace with white plaster hood returning to view
Tall stack of chopped firewood visible again upon return
Wooden chopping block with axe in the center of the room

segments.scene_description: After a brief moment sitting at the table, Geralt begins the return journey through the dark corridor, ascending the stairs and re-entering the main room with the stone fireplace and woodpile, completing the exploration loop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic medieval cottage that shifts from a warm, cozy living space into a dark transition and finally into a lit storage room. It begins in a main hall illuminated by the glow of a large stone fireplace, passing by a woodpile and pottery-lined shelves. As the character moves away from the fire, the scene shifts into a narrow, dimly lit corridor where the camera descends a steep staircase along stone and wooden walls. The environment then opens up into a well-lit upper room filled with wooden barrels and a dining table, with a small lattice window revealing the night sky. Finally, the camera explores the perimeter of the room before turning toward Geralt for a close-up shot.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a quiet moment of stillness into a journey back through the cottage's dim interior. It begins with Geralt sitting at a table before he rises and moves away, entering a dark, narrow corridor. As he progresses, the camera follows him ascending a set of stairs, shifting the perspective from the confined hallway back toward the open living space. The scene then expands as he re-enters the main room, where the lighting transforms from the shadows of the corridor to the warm glow of the stone fireplace and nearby woodpile.
